Synapsale

Focus on accounts that actually show interest

Account signals help prioritize timing, relevance and qualified meetings instead of adding noise to the CRM.

Diagnosis

Problem

A tool alone does not fix a weak process. Without structure, the operation scales disorder.

  • Incomplete data
  • Different criteria
  • Isolated automations

System

What Rotata does

We design the operating architecture: data, processes, automation, reporting and handoffs between teams.

CRM architecture

Data model, lifecycle stages, pipelines and reporting designed around the real sales process.

Sales automation

Workflows that reduce friction, keep follow-up consistent and connect marketing with sales.

Account intelligence

Data, signals and intent used to prioritize accounts with a higher chance of moving forward.

Outbound system

Targeting, sequences, messaging and measurement so prospecting is not improvised.

Measurement

Outcomes we target

Better visibility, stronger prioritization, less friction and a common way to measure growth.

  • Pipeline clarity
  • Traceable follow-up
  • Actionable data
  • Reliable reporting

Architecture

When it matters

When the tool needs to become the operating system for growth, not another layer of activity.

  • Defined processes
  • Connected data
  • Automation with criteria

Rotata

Structure this system

Diagnose system

The system behind B2B growth.
